offer: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 orders/month, delayed inventory monitoring causes stockouts. We provide real-time inventory alerts instead of manual tracking.
problem: Stockouts due to delayed inventory monitoring
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where Amazon sellers seek help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar inventory issues
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Engage in community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try real-time inventory alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
